title.en: Hanging a Picture on the Wall

phrases.en: I pick a bare spot on the wall for the picture.
phrases.zh: 我在墙上挑一处空白的地方来挂画。

phrases.en: I hold the frame up and look at it carefully.
phrases.zh: 我把画框举起来，仔细地端详它。

phrases.en: I measure the height with a tape measure.
I mark the right spot lightly with a pencil.
phrases.zh: 我用铅笔轻轻地在合适的位置做个记号。

phrases.en: I press the hook against the pencil mark.
phrases.zh: 我把挂钩抵在铅笔记号上。

phrases.en: I tap the nail in gently with a hammer.
phrases.zh: 我用锤子轻轻地把钉子敲进去。

phrases.en: I hammer the nail until it feels firm.
phrases.zh: 我把钉子钉牢，直到它感觉很稳固。

phrases.en: I hang the picture on the hook.
I place a small level on top of the frame.
phrases.zh: 我把一个小水平仪放在画框的顶部。

phrases.en: I slide one side up a little until it looks straight.
phrases.zh: 我把一边稍微往上移，直到它看起来很平直。

phrases.en: I step back and check that the picture is not crooked.
phrases.zh: 我退后一步，检查这幅画是不是歪了。

phrases.en: I wipe the pencil mark off the wall with my finger.
phrases.zh: 我用手指把墙上的铅笔记号擦掉。
